name: Cleaning
basis: Post-job cleanup: sweep/vacuum debris, wipe surfaces, bag trash, haul-ready staging, final wipe-down. ~1 hr at $100/hr flat for a standard single-room/small job. Supplies (bags, wipes, cleaner) ~$15. Scales with job size. Handyman-legal.
sources: Post-construction/post-job cleanup $50-$100/hr; handyman punch-out cleanup commonly a 1-hr flat add-on. Melbourne cleaning services ~$40-$75/hr; job-site cleanup trends higher.
